items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I go home with my sister.
items.translation: Voy a casa con mi hermana.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L20-05 - E1205 - Emma - I go home with my sister.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I drink tea in the morning.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L28-04 - E1284 - Emma - I drink tea in the morning.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I sometimes go to the library.
items.translation: A veces voy a la biblioteca.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L30-04 - E1304 - Emma - I sometimes go to the library.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I'm going to visit my cousin.
items.translation: Voy a visitar a mi primo.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-02 - E1402 - Ethan - I'm going to visit my cousin.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: I'm going to study in the morning.
items.translation: Voy a estudiar por la mañana.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-03 - E1403 - Mia - I'm going to study in the morning.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I'm going to watch a movie.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-04 - E1404 - Emma - I'm going to watch a movie.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-05 - E1405 - Noah - I'm going to play soccer.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: We are all going to be busy.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-06 - E1406 - Ethan - We are all going to be busy.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: What is the homework for tomorrow?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L47-04 - E1474 - Ethan - What is the homework for tomorrow.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: Tomorrow we are going to visit the museum.
items.translation: Mañana vamos a visitar el museo.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L48-01 - E1481 - Mr. Carter - Tomorrow we are going to visit the museum.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I think it will be fun.
